div.h3: Featured Topic: Checkmk Cloud May 2026 update
div.p: The Checkmk Cloud May 2025 update offers many improvements in usability and functionality. Here’s what you can expect in the new version of Checkmk:

ul.li: A cleaner interface: A cleaner interface: A new search function now finds search terms across all Checkmk components.

Activate changes with improved usability: Pending changes are now displayed in the navigation bar. Clicking on them opens a slideout that overlays the currently open page. After activating the changes, you’ll return to where you were last working.
PodMan-Monitoring: Checkmk Cloud can now also monitor the PodMan container runtime.
The Checkmk Relay: The Relay also allows you to monitor devices via SNMP or a special agent that are not directly accessible from the Checkmk server.
Revamped OpenTelemetry Monitoring: OpenTelemetry Monitoring has undergone a major upgrade. In particular, the new metrics backend contributes to a significant performance boost.

a.title: Checkmk live-stream - Get insights into the new Checkmk Cloud
